evals.name: eval-all-pass
evals.prompt: ok voy a hacer un commit con los cambios de hoy, todo bien? puedes revisarlo antes
evals.expected_output: Runs all 4 checks (tsc, lint, tests, format), shows output of each, ends with a clear summary block using emojis, concludes safe or not safe to commit

evals.name: eval-type-error
evals.expected_output: Runs all 4 checks, clearly identifies any TypeScript errors in the summary, shows ❌ for failing checks and ✅ for passing ones, gives actionable next steps

evals.name: eval-format-fail
evals.prompt: quiero commitear los cambios del leaderboard, hay algún problema con el código?
evals.expected_output: Runs all 4 checks, if format check fails tells user to run npm run format to fix automatically, summary is concise and clear
